user_story: As a System admin, I want to access the Wrike Integration configuration screen, so that I can connect resource management with Wrike
acceptance_criteria: Given I am authenticated; When I navigate to the Wrike Integration screen; Then the integration configuration page is available

user_story: As a System admin, I want the Wrike Integration screen to require a valid login session, so that integration settings remain secure
acceptance_criteria: Given I am not authenticated; When I attempt to open the Wrike Integration screen; Then I am redirected to the login page
